transcript:
CALLER: Haan, main ek oncologist se milna chahta hoon. Mere uncle ko cancer hai — early stage, detect hua hai recently.
AGENT: Main samajhta hoon yeh bahut difficult waqt hai. Hum aapki poori madad karenge. Aapka naam aur uncle ka naam?
CALLER: Main Kiran Patil hoon. Uncle ka naam Ramesh Patil hai. Mera number 9823001199 hai.
AGENT: Shukriya Kiran ji. Dr. Jayashree Nair humare oncology consultant hain. Urgent case ke liye kal subah 10 AM slot available hai. Karoon book?
CALLER: Haan please, kal hi theek hai. Pehli stage hai toh jaldi shuru karna chahte hain.
AGENT: Bilkul sahi soch rahe hain. Ramesh Patil, kal 10 AM, Dr. Jayashree Nair. Biopsy report aur jo bhi reports hain saath laana. SMS aayega. Himmat rakhein — sahi jagah aaye hain.
CALLER: Bahut shukriya. Aapne dhaaras diya.
